message.content:
@startuml
actor User
participant "MyBackupService" as MyBackupService #D3D8E6
participant "TaskDispatcher" as TaskDispatcher #D3D8E6
participant "TaskFactory" as TaskFactory #D3D8E6
participant "SimpleTask" as SimpleTask #D3D8E6

User -> MyBackupService : SimpleBackup()
activate MyBackupService
    MyBackupService -->+ TaskDispatcher : New
        return TaskDispatcher 
    deactivate TaskDispatcher
    
    activate TaskDispatcher    
    MyBackupService->> TaskDispatcher  : SimpleTask()  
            activate TaskFactory        
                create participant SimpleTask                
                    TaskFactory-->- TaskDispatcher   <<create>>   
                        note right of SimpleTask::creation            
                            The object can be created in this block or after creation                        
                        endnote                    
                    destroy SimpleTask              
            deactivate TaskFactory      
end
@enduml
